title: The Worm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Worm''' was the twelve-thousand-year-old remnants of a deceased [[Space worm/Legends|space worm]] that inhabited the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Eskaron]], forming the walls of the tunnel that it laired in when it died. It was discovered at some point between [[72 BBY/Legends|72 BBY]] and [[53 BBY/Legends|53 BBY]], during one of the races through the moon's interior when one of the racers, [[Likk Nibk]], took a wrong turn while trying to pass a rival [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]]. Nibk blasted through the end of the worm and ended up winning the race. After that, scientists went to explore it, and races were routed away from the worm's location.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''
